case_title: PATEL, MOHAN vs. ARREDONDO, JAMES et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ARREDONDO, JAMES

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:L.NAJERA/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY DHAVAL PANCHAL PRESENT WITH PLTF. DEFT JAMES ARREDONDO PRESENT IN PRO-PER. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF SUBMITTED PREPARED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARREDONDO, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 507 BUSH STREET, ROOM #109, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $190.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $190.00, STAYED UNTIL NOV-18-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT AGAINST JAMES ARREDONDO AND ANY UNNAMED OCCUPANTS, DOES 1-10. IF DEFT FAILS TO PAY PLTF THE SUM OF $190 ON OR BEFORE 10-23-96, AND DOES NOT CURE BREACH W/IN 24HRS AFTER NOTICE, PLTF MAY SEEK EX-PARTE AMD JUDGMNT FOR POSS & BACK RENT. SEE JUDGMENT FOR OTHER DETAILS.
